You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Rajkumar Porwal is working as Professor and Head, Mechanical Engineering Department since 03 December 2018. He has been working in the area of Mechanical Vibration, Nonlinear System Identification. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1. Ph.D. Mechanical Vibrations 2011 IIT, Kanpur 2. M.E. Mechanical 1992 IISc. Bangalore 3. B.E. Mechanical 1990 Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore/ DAVV, Indore 4. HSC PCM 1984 M.P. Board of Secondary Education, Bhopal Work Experience: S. No. Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 1. Professor Mechanical Engg. Deptt. SGSITS, Indore From 28-07-2012 to Cont. 2. Associate Professor Mechanical Engg. Deptt. SGSITS, Indore From 22-07-2007 to 27-07-2012 3. Reader Mechanical Engg. Deptt. SGSITS, Indore From 22-07-2004 to 21-07-2007 4. Lecturer (Senior Scale) Mechanical Engg. Deptt. SGSITS, Indore From 22-07-1999 to 21-07-2004 5. Lecturer Mechanical Engg. Deptt. SGSITS, Indore From 13-07-1994 to 21-07-1999 6. Assistant Engineer Tata Consulting Engineers, Hyderabad From 11-03-1993 to 07-07-1994 PhD Supervision: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Publications: (I) International/National Journal Publications Porwal, N.S. Vyas, "Damped quadratic and mixed-parity oscillator response using Krylov_Bogoliubov method and energy balance", Journal of Sound and Vibration, 309 (2008), 877-886. Ganesh, Raju Giri, R. Kaul, P Ram Sankar, Pragya Tiwari, Ashok Atulkar, R. K. Porwal, “Studies on pitting corrosion and sensitization in laser rapid manufactured specimens of type 316L stainless steel”, Materials and Design, 39(2012), 509-521. (II) International/National Conference Publications Rathore, V. Kumar Jain, A. Atulkar, Kuldeep Kumar Singh, Rajkumar Porwal, "Study of Lorentz force detuning and its compensation in superconducting radiofrequency cavity: A review, Materials Today: Proceedings, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matpr.2020.11.506 A chouhan, P Gangsar, R Porwal, CK Mechefske, “Artificial neural network based fault diagnostics for three phase induction motors iunder similar operating conditions”, Vibroengineering PROCEDIA 30, 55-60, 2020. Abhisar Chouhan, Purushottam Gangsar, Rajkumar Porwal, “Artificial neural network based fault diagnostics for induction motors in different Machine Tool Applications”, COPEN-2019, IIT, Rahul Kumar Tale. Abhay Kumar, Avinash Putambekar, Vijay Kumar Bhardwaj, Rajkumar Porwal, “Electron Beam Welding Process Simulation Using Computational Fluid Dynamics”, Indian Conference on Applied Mechanics (INCAM) 2017, 5-7 July 2017, MANIT, Allahabad. Nilesh Kumar Jat, Akhiesh Karnewar, Abhay Kumar, Rajkumar Porwal, R K Sahu and T. A. Puntabekar, “CFD Simulation for Analyzing the Temperature Distribution Prevailing in INDUS-2 Tunnel Due to Existing Air Handling System”, Indian Conference on Applied Mechanics (INCAM) 2017, 5-7 July 2017, MANIT, Allahabad. Porwal, N.S. Vyas, "Errors in Nonlinear System Parameter Estimation Using Wavelet Transform" IMAC- XXVI, Orlando, Florida, USA, February 2008 Porwal , N.S. Vyas , "Nonlinear Damping Estimation of Self-Excited System Using Wavelet Transform" IMAC- XXVII, , Orlando,Florida, USA, February 2009. Porwal , N.S. Vyas , "Stiffness nonlinearity classification using Morlet wavelet" The 2nd Conference on Dynamics, Vibration and Control; August 10-15, 2009, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. G.R. Desale, R. K. Porwal, B. K. Gandhi, “Erosion Wear of cast iron in Sand-Water Slurries”, The Institution of Engineers(India), 17 th National Convention, November, 2001, 426-432. Google Scholar Link: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xhv00BcAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao Projects: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Testing & Consultancy: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Other Details: (I) List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized 1. Course Convenor of STTP on “Advanced Engineering Thermodynamics and Heat Transfer” Sponsored by AICTE, Conducted by Department of Mechanical Engineering, Shri G. S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore, during July 8-13, 2019. (II) Invited Lectures/Expert Talks/Chairmanships at Conferences Expert Lecture in STTP entitled “Mechanical Engineering Design Practices and Codes” January 2014, SGSITS Indore. Expert Lecture in STTP entitled “Modelling, Simulation and Analytical Technique for Dynamic System”, SGSITS, Indore.
